info.title: mc-trade
info.description:
Authentication Center

This spec only includes interfaces annotated with @OpenApiPermission, i.e., the public OpenAPI subset exposed to end users/integrators and accessed via API Gateway using Access Key / Secret Key (AK/SK) signature authentication. It excludes backend Admin, internal Feign, and other non-exposed interfaces.

login.description: MT5 Contract Account ID / Spot Account ID

symbol.description: Trading pair, e.g., BTCUSDT. Only valid when placing an order

type.description:
Order Type
"0-OP_BUY: Market buy",
"1-OP_SELL: Market sell",
"2-OP_BUY_LIMIT: Buy limit pending order",
"3-OP_SELL_LIMIT: Sell limit pending order",
"4-OP_BUY_STOP: Buy stop pending order",
"5-OP_SELL_STOP: Sell stop pending order",
"6-OP_BUY_STOP_LIMIT: Buy stop limit pending order",
"7-OP_SELL_STOP_LIMIT: Sell stop limit pending order",
"8-OP_CLOSE_BY: Close by order, only applicable to hedging mode"

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

params.description: MT5 return parameters (passed through to frontend or for business logic processing)

login.description: MT5 Contract Account ID / Spot Account ID

symbol.description: Trading pair, e.g., BTCUSDT. Only valid when placing an order

type.description:
Order Type
"0-OP_BUY: Market buy",
"1-OP_SELL: Market sell",
"2-OP_BUY_LIMIT: Buy limit pending order",

typeTime.description:
Time validity type. Defaults to 0 if not provided",
"0-GTC (Good Till Cancel)",
"1-GTD (Good Till Day - valid for the day)",
"2-Specified time",
"3-Specified day. Expiry time is 00:00 of the specified day or the nearest trading time"

volumeExt.description: Volume, value scaled by 10^8. For 1 lot, pass 1 * 100000000. Must match the volumeExt passed when placing the order

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

params.description: MT5 return parameters (passed through to frontend or for business logic processing)

login.description: MT5 Contract Account ID / Spot Account ID

volumeExt.description: Volume, value scaled by 10^8. For 1 lot, pass 1 * 100000000

price.description: Order price. Defaults to 0 if not provided: 0 means market price, other values mean limit price

type.description:
Order Type
"0-OP_BUY: Market buy",
"1-OP_SELL: Market sell",
"2-OP_BUY_LIMIT: Buy limit pending order",
"3-OP_SELL_LIMIT: Sell limit pending order",
"4-OP_BUY_STOP: Buy stop pending order",
"5-OP_SELL_STOP: Sell stop pending order",
"6-OP_BUY_STOP_LIMIT: Buy stop limit pending order",
"7-OP_SELL_STOP_LIMIT: Sell stop limit pending order",
"8-OP_CLOSE_BY: Close by order, only applicable to hedging mode"

typeFill.description:
Deal Type
"0-Fill or Kill (FOK). Order must be fully filled or canceled immediately; partial fills are not kept.",
"1-Immediate or Cancel (IOC). Order can be partially filled, and the remaining unfilled volume is automatically canceled.",
"2-Return to Queue. This mode is used for pending orders (e.g., limit orders, stop orders), only supports “exchange-executed market order” scenarios: unfilled portions are returned to the order queue to wait for subsequent execution.",
"3-BOC (Book or Cancel). Order can only be submitted in the market depth (order book). If immediately fillable when placed, it is canceled directly.<"

typeTime.description:
Time validity type. Defaults to 0 if not provided",
"0-GTC (Good Till Cancel)",
"1-GTD (Good Till Day - valid for the day)",
"2-Specified time",
"3-Specified day. Expiry time is 00:00 of the specified day or the nearest trading time"

expiration.description: Expiry timestamp (required when typeTime=2). Defaults to 0 if not passed, meaning no auto-expiry

priceTrigger.description: Stop limit order trigger price. Defaults to 0 if not passed

userSlippageLimit.description: Maximum slippage limit set by user for market orders (only valid for market orders)

frontMarketPrice.description: Front-end market reference price (optional), must not be less than 0

transCostMode.description: Trading Cost Config - Mode TRADE_AMOUNT: Trade Amount

value.description: Slippage value; stored and retrieved as-is. For PERCENTAGE type, range is (0,100], 0.05=0.05%

get.description:
Query unfilled order list (pending orders) based on the current user's UID, obtained from the X-UID request header
Required Permission: READ

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

login.description: Login account, MT5 account login number

dealer.description: Dealer ID, the MT5 dealer code

symbol.description: Trading symbol, e.g., EURUSD, GBPUSD, etc.

digits.description: Price precision, the number of decimal places for the trading symbol

digitsCurrency.description: Currency precision, the number of currency decimal places for the trading symbol

contractSize.description: Contract size, the standard size per lot

reason.description: Reason, the reason code for the order change

timeSetup.description: Order time, the timestamp when the order was created, in milliseconds, 13 digits

timeExpiration.description: Expiry time, the expiration timestamp of the order, in milliseconds, 13 digits

timeDone.description: Completion time, the timestamp when the order was completed, in milliseconds, 13 digits

timeSetupMsc.description: Order time (ms), the timestamp when the order was created (milliseconds), 13 digits

timeDoneMsc.description: Completion time (ms), the timestamp when the order was completed (milliseconds), 13 digits

modifyFlags.description: Modification flags, the flag bits for order modification

type.description: Order type, e.g., buy, sell, etc.

typeFill.description: Deal type, the fill type of the order

typeTime.description: Time validity type, the validity type of the order

priceOrder.description: Order price, the execution price of the order

priceTrigger.description: Trigger price, the trigger price of the order

priceCurrent.description: Current price, the current market price of the order

priceSlScale.description: Stop loss price display decimal places

priceTpScale.description: Take profit price display decimal places

volumeInitialExt.description: Initial extended volume, the initial extended volume of the order (for large orders)

volumeCurrentExt.description: Current extended volume, the current extended volume of the order

quantity.description: User quantity, equals current remaining volumeCurrentExt divided by 10^8

rateMargin.description: Margin exchange rate, the exchange rate used when calculating margin

activationMode.description: Activation mode, the activation mode of the pending order

activationTime.description: Activation time, the activation timestamp of the pending order

activationPrice.description: Activation price, the activation price of the pending order

activationFlags.description: Activation flag, the flag bit for pending order activation

volumeInitial.description: Initial volume, the initial trading volume of the order

volumeCurrent.description: Current volume, the current trading volume of the order

externalID.description: External ID, the ID associated with the external system

priceSL.description: Stop loss price, the set stop loss level

priceTP.description: Take profit price, the set take profit level

expertID.description: Expert Advisor ID. If the order was created by an EA (Expert Advisor), records the EA ID

positionID.description: Position ID, the associated position ID

positionByID.description: Opposite position ID, the associated opposite position ID

get.description:
Query historical deal list by UID and account data type (SPOT/CONTRACT/SPOT_CONTRACT)
Required Permission: READ

type.description: Account data type: SPOT-Spot, CONTRACT-Contract, SPOT_CONTRACT-Combined Spot and Contract

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

login.description: Login account, MT5 account login number

dealer.description: Dealer ID, the MT5 dealer code

reason.description: Reason, the reason code for the deal change

digits.description: Price precision, the number of decimal places for the trading symbol

digitsCurrency.description: Currency precision, the number of currency decimal places for the trading symbol

contractSize.description: Contract size, the standard size per lot

time.description: Deal time, the timestamp when the deal occurred, in milliseconds, 13 digits

timeMsc.description: Deal time (ms), the timestamp when the deal occurred (milliseconds), 13 digits

symbol.description: Trading symbol, e.g., EURUSD, GBPUSD, etc.

price.description: Deal price, the execution price of the deal

volumeExt.description: Extended volume, the extended volume of the deal (for large orders). Divide by 100000000 to convert to a floating point number

profit.description: Profit/Loss, the profit/loss amount generated by the deal

storage.description: Storage fee, the storage fee generated by the position

commission.description: Commission, the commission fee generated by the deal

commissionDisplay.description: Commission display value, rounded using CEILING with sign, fixed to 6 decimal places

profitDisplay.description: Profit/Loss display value, fixed to 8 decimal places using HALF_UP rounding

fee.description: Commission, the commission fee generated by the deal

rateProfit.description: Profit/Loss exchange rate, the exchange rate used when calculating P/L

rateMargin.description: Margin exchange rate, the exchange rate used when calculating margin

profitRaw.description: Original profit/loss, the raw profit/loss amount of the deal (before exchange rate conversion)

pricePosition.description: Position price, the average price of the position

volumeClosedExt.description: Closed extended volume, the closed extended volume

tickValue.description: Point value, the value per point

tickSize.description: Point size, the size per point

flags.description: Flags, the flag bits of the deal

value.description: Value, the value of the deal

gateway.description: Gateway, the name of the dealing gateway

priceGateway.description: Gateway price, the dealing price at the gateway

modifyFlags.description: Modification flags, the flag bits for deal modification

marketBid.description: Market bid price, the current market bid price

marketAsk.description: Market ask price, the current market ask price

marketLast.description: Market last price, the last market dealing price

volume.description: Volume, the trading volume of the deal in lots. Divide by 10000 to convert to a floating point number

volumeClosed.description: Closed volume, the closed trading volume

externalID.description: External ID, the ID associated with the external system

expertID.description: Expert Advisor ID. If the deal was created by an EA (Expert Advisor), records the EA ID

positionID.description: Position ID, the associated position ID

priceSL.description: Stop loss price, the set stop loss level

priceTP.description: Take profit price, the set take profit level

get.description:
Query recent deals by symbol, with the number of records controlled by the limit parameter
Required Permission: Public Access

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.
Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

get.description:
Query the fund movement history of the trading account based on the current user's UID, i.e., the collateral increase/decrease history. UID obtained from the X-UID request header
Required Permission: READ

login.description: MT5 Contract Account ID / Spot Account ID

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

volume.description: Transfer amount. Positive means increase, negative means deduction

value.description: Converted USDC value (at the time of transfer)

price.description: USDC price (at the time of transfer)

get.description:
Query all currently open positions based on the current user's UID, obtained from the X-UID request header.
MT5 uses integers to represent floating-point numbers in many places to avoid precision issues.
Rules:
Fields without 'ext' suffix represent 4 decimal places — divide by 10000 to convert to float.
Fields with 'ext' suffix represent 8 decimal places — divide by 100000000 to convert to float.

Example:
The mt5_positions table has Volume and VolumeExt
Required Permission: READ

login.description: MT5 Contract Account ID / Spot Account ID

positionType.description: If not passed or ALL: All, COLLATERAL: Collateral only, SYMBOL: Trading positions only

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

position.description: Position number, the unique position identifier in the MT5 system

login.description: Login account, MT5 account login number

dealer.description: Dealer ID, the MT5 dealer code

symbol.description: Trading symbol, e.g., EURUSD, GBPUSD, etc.

digits.description: Price precision, the number of decimal places for the trading symbol

digitsCurrency.description: Currency precision, the number of currency decimal places for the trading symbol

profitCurrencyDigits.description: P/L currency display precision. Priority: position DigitsCurrency > mt5_symbols.CurrencyProfitDigits > fallback 2

reason.description: Reason, the reason code for the position change

contractSize.description: Contract size, the standard size per lot

timeCreate.description: Creation time, the timestamp when the position was created, in milliseconds, 13 digits

timeUpdate.description: Update time, the timestamp when the position was last updated, in milliseconds, 13 digits

timeCreateMsc.description: Creation time (ms), the timestamp when the position was created (milliseconds), 13 digits

timeUpdateMsc.description: Update time (ms), the timestamp when the position was last updated (milliseconds), 13 digits

priceOpen.description: Open price, the opening price of the position

priceCurrent.description: Current price, the current market price of the position

priceSlScale.description: Stop loss price display decimal places

priceTpScale.description: Take profit price display decimal places

volumeExt.description: Extended volume, the extended volume of the position (for large orders). Divide by 100000000 to convert to a floating point number

profit.description: Profit/Loss, the floating profit/loss amount of the current position

storage.description: Storage fee, the overnight interest/storage fee of the position

rateProfit.description: Profit/Loss exchange rate, the exchange rate used when calculating P/L

rateMargin.description: Margin exchange rate, the exchange rate used when calculating margin

activationMode.description: Activation mode, the activation mode of the pending order

activationTime.description: Activation time, the activation timestamp of the pending order

activationPrice.description: Activation price, the activation price of the pending order

activationFlags.description: Activation flag, the flag bit for pending order activation

volume.description: Volume, the trading volume of the position in lots. Divide by 10000 to convert to a floating point number

externalID.description: External ID, the ID associated with the external system

priceSL.description: Stop loss price, the set stop loss level

priceTP.description: Take profit price, the set take profit level

expertID.description: Expert Advisor ID. If the position was created by an EA (Expert Advisor), records the EA ID

expertPositionID.description: Expert Advisor position ID, the position ID associated with EA-created positions

get.summary: Total P/L Statistics for a Time Period
get.description:
Query P/L statistics for a time period based on the current user's UID (e.g., last week's P/L). UID obtained from the X-UID request header. If form&to are not passed, defaults to the last 7 days
Required Permission: READ

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

get.summary: Query total long/short position lots by trading symbol
get.description:
Symbol corresponds to mt5_positions.Symbol; only counts symbols whose Path starts with CFD; Lots = VolumeExt/1e8.
Required Permission: Public Access

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

get.summary: Query total long/short position notional value by trading symbol
get.description:
Symbol corresponds to mt5_positions.Symbol; only counts symbols whose Path starts with CFD; Notional = VolumeExt/1e8 * PriceCurrent * RateProfit * ContractSize (not differentiated by Symbol).
Required Permission: Public Access

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

"0-GTC (Good Till Cancel)",
"1-GTD (Good Till Day - valid for the day)",
"2-Specified time",
"3-Specified day. Expiry time is 00:00 of the specified day or the nearest trading time"

expiration.description: Expiry timestamp (required when typeTime=2). Defaults to 0 if not passed, meaning no auto-expiry

priceTrigger.description: Stop limit order trigger price. Defaults to 0 if not passed

frontMarketPrice.description: Front-end market reference price (optional), must not be less than 0

IESlipLosing.title: Max decline in loss direction for market execution

IESlipProfit.title: Max decline in profit direction for market execution

IEVolumeMaxExt.title: Max trade volume for market execution

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

value.description: Slippage value; stored and retrieved as-is. For PERCENTAGE type, range is (0,100], 0.05=0.05%

valueType.description: Slippage value type: POINT-Points, PERCENTAGE-Percentage, defaults to POINT

slippageCoefficient.description: Slippage coefficient k, independent of value/valueType

transCostMode.description: Trading Cost Config - Mode TRADE_AMOUNT: Trade Amount

login.description: MT5 Contract Account ID / Spot Account ID

type.description:
Order Type
"0-OP_BUY: Market buy",
"1-OP_SELL: Market sell",
"2-OP_BUY_LIMIT: Buy limit pending order",
"3-OP_SELL_LIMIT: Sell limit pending order",
"4-OP_BUY_STOP: Buy stop pending order",
"5-OP_SELL_STOP: Sell stop pending order",
"6-OP_BUY_STOP_LIMIT: Buy stop limit pending order",
"7-OP_SELL_STOP_LIMIT: Sell stop limit pending order",
"8-OP_CLOSE_BY: Close by order, only applicable to hedging mode"

volumeExt.description: Order quantity (extended precision * 100000000). If order quantity is 0.01, pass 0.01 * 100000000

entry.title: Entry type, the entry type of the deal (e.g., open, close)

price.description: Deal price, the execution price of the deal

storage.description: Storage fee, the storage fee generated by the position
